summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new Plan Library features: Compliance Check popup, Assign Employees dialog, and Employee Portal filtering. All backend tests passed (15/15). All frontend UI tests passed. Features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns MEC data with 7 checks
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns MV percentage vs 60% threshold
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns Affordability with employee count and pass rate
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns overall_compliant status
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns 404 for invalid plan
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/employees-list/{employer_id} returns employee list (57 employees)
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/assigned-employees returns assignments
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/assign-employees assigns employees
Backend: Verify assignments persisted via GET
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/unassign-employees removes assignments
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/assignments/{employer_id} returns all assignments
Backend: POST assign-employees with empty list returns 400
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns plans
Backend: Employee sees assigned plans only when assignments exist
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/plans/{employer_id} returns plans
Frontend: Plan Library page loads with Check and Assign buttons on each plan card (9 plans)
Frontend: Compliance Check dialog opens with MEC, MV, Affordability sections
Frontend: Compliance Check shows 7 MEC checks all passing
Frontend: Compliance Check shows MV 62% vs 60% threshold (Pass)
Frontend: Compliance Check shows Affordability 57 employees checked, 100% pass rate
Frontend: Compliance Check shows 3 Pass badges
Frontend: Assign Employees dialog opens with search input, Select All button, Save button
Frontend: Assign Employees shows 57 employee rows with Department, Type, Hours/Week columns
Frontend: Search filter works (searching 'Maria' shows 1 row)
Frontend: Select All/Deselect All toggles work
Frontend: Selecting employees and saving assignments works
Frontend: Assignment count badge appears on plan card after saving (e.g., '3 assigned')
Frontend: Employee Portal (Maria) shows enrolled plan correctly
Frontend: Employee Portal (Alex) shows all 5 medical plans (no specific assignments)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Created plan assignments during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plan Library features fully tested. Compliance Check popup shows MEC (7 checks), MV (percentage vs 60%), Affordability (employee count, pass rate). Assign Employees dialog shows employee list with search, Select All, checkboxes, department/type/hours columns. Assignment count badges appear on plan cards. Employee Portal prioritizes plan_assignments over eligibility_results - if assignments exist, only those plans show; otherwise falls back to all eligible plans. Key data-testids: compliance-dialog, mec-check-result, mv-check-result, affordability-check-result, status-pass, status-fail, assign-dialog, assign-search-input, assign-toggle-all, save-assignments-btn, assign-row-{id}, compliance-check-{id}, assign-employees-{id}, assignment-count-{id}.

compliance_check_dialog.mec_section: 7 checks: Is Group Health Plan, Covers Essential Benefits, Covers Preventive Care, No Annual Limits, No Lifetime Limits, Covers Dependents To 26, No Preexisting Exclusions - all with checkmarks
compliance_check_dialog.mv_section: Plan MV Percentage 62%, Required Threshold 60%, Actuarial Certification Certified, Method HHS Calculator, progress bar
compliance_check_dialog.affordability_section: Employee Monthly Cost $100, Safe Harbor Method W-2 Safe Harbor, Threshold 9.02% of W-2, Employees Checked 57, Affordable For 57, Unaffordable For 0, Pass Rate 100%

assign_employees_dialog.header: Assign Employees - Select employees to offer {plan_name} ({carrier})
assign_employees_dialog.search: Search by name, email, or department...

plan_card_badges.assignment_count: Purple badge with Users icon showing 'X assigned'
